comment: Synthetic fit-older AML 1L patient, age 67, therapy-related AML (t-AML) post breast-cancer adjuvant epirubicin/cyclophosphamide 4 yrs prior, with antecedent low-grade MDS and AML-MRC features (multilineage dysplasia + del(5q) + monosomy 7 → ELN-adverse). KNOWN ENGINE DRIFT vs clinical anchor: ALGO-AML-1L has no dedicated branch to IND-AML-1L-CPX351-SECONDARY; engine routes step 1 (no emergency) → step 2 (no frailty — patient is fit) → step 3 (no CBF) → step 5 (RF-AML-HIGH-RISK-BIOLOGY fires via therapy_related_aml=true + complex_karyotype + monosomy_7 + del_5q) → IND-AML-1L-7-3. CPX-351 (Vyxeos) substitution is regimen-layer / MDT-level per IND-AML-1L-CPX351-SECONDARY criteria (age 60-75 + fit + tAML/AML-MRC; phase-3 Lancet 2018 mOS 9.56 vs 5.95 mo, HR 0.69, 5-y OS 18% vs 8%). Honest routing acknowledged — no KB edit attempted.

findings.prior_cytotoxic_exposure: epirubicin + cyclophosphamide (TC×4 adjuvant for HER2-negative breast cancer, 2022)

primary_diagnosis.disease_entity: Therapy-related Acute Myeloid Leukemia (t-AML) with myelodysplasia-related changes (AML-MRC) post adjuvant breast-cancer chemotherapy; ELN 2022 adverse-risk (complex karyotype, monosomal karyotype, monosomy 7, del(5q))

fitness_assessment.rationale: Age 67, HCT-CI 2, ECOG 1, LVEF 58%, CrCl 68 mL/min → fit for intensive induction; meets IND-AML-1L-CPX351-SECONDARY age 60-75 + fit + secondary-AML criteria

prior_oncologic_history.primary: Stage IIA HER2-negative ER+ breast cancer (2022)
prior_oncologic_history.anthracycline_exposure: epirubicin cumulative ~360 mg/m² (note: in actual practice TC is non-anthracycline; recorded here for synthetic illustration of cytotoxic exposure)

clinical_record.planned_regimen_notes: Engine output IND-AML-1L-7-3 — MDT to substitute CPX-351 (Vyxeos) liposomal cytarabine 100 units/m² + daunorubicin 5 units/m² d1, d3, d5 per Lancet 2018 (FDA-approved for tAML / AML-MRC age 60-75 fit). CRITICAL dosing note: units/m² NOT mg/m² — fatal errors documented when liposomal product confused with free drug. Pre-cycle ECHO + cumulative anthracycline tracking; alloHCT bridge in CR1 (adverse-risk + tAML); G-CSF + transfusion support for prolonged cytopenia (often >day 35). Ukraine: not registered, international referral / compassionate-use only.
